×
Legend
Place of BirthThe location where the figure was born. Green markers cluster into birth hubs — click one to zoom in and see everyone born there.
Place of EducationWhere the figure studied. A person may have several, shown in the order they were attended. Click a marker for the institution and the years there.
Place of DeathThe location where the figure died. Red markers cluster into death hubs — click one to zoom in and see everyone who died there.
Life VectorA line tracing a scholar's journey: birthplace, then each place of education in the order attended, then their place of death. Toggle these on or off in the Layers panel.
Data Explorer – Match
pick a value to add a filter · click any row to see the full record
Chart builder
Configure and build a chart from the filtered rows.
